title: Warm Homes: Social Housing Fund Wave 3 – successful Social Housing Landlords including local authorities and housing associations
body: "Just under £1.15 billion has been offered to retrofit social homes across 138 projects under the Warm Homes: Social Housing Fund Wave 3. Match funding from Wave 3 applicants provides at least the same amount. This includes funding offered for:   17 Strategic Partnership projects 121 Challenge Fund projects   The West Midlands Combined Authority (WMCA) and the Greater Manchester Combined Authority (GMCA) have received an allocation of this funding as part of the first Integrated Settlements.  The Warm Homes: Social Housing Fund Wave 3 builds on the allocations made under the previous waves of SHDF.  "
